🌹 Easy to Inflate & Deflate: The film purple number balloons only need to be filled with 90% air or helium. when you want to fill the balloon with air, just put the straw or insert the helium valve into the plastic valve at the bottom of the figure and blow slowly. When the balloon is fully inflated, remove the straw and squeeze the self-sealing plastic valve. If you want your balloon to float in the air, you can go to your local convenience store and fill it with helium.

🌹 Resuable: Giant purple number 2 balloon can be reusable repeatedly with self-sealing valve, convenient to inflate and deflate by an air. After party ending, the number balloons will easy to deflate and store for next time use. Do not overfill the balloon to avoid sunburn, overheating, sharp objects and excessive friction.

🌹 Perfect Party Decotation: These foil number balloons are suitable to coincide with different themes that you want to decoration. Creat lively and happy atmosphere for your 2nd happy birthday or anniversary party by number balloons decoration. Number balloons not only perfect for baby shower, wedding, engagement, birthday party, graduation party, anniversary decoration, but also perfect for any indoor or outdoor party as a photo background.
